title: Blackjack
description: A physical blackjack table plugin for Minecraft servers that creates interactive card tables in the game world. Players can join tables, place bets, and play blackjack with realistic 3D card displays.
body:
# рҹғҸ Blackjack Plugin
**A premium physical blackjack table plugin for Minecraft servers** *Create interactive card tables in your game world with realistic 3D card displays* ![Blackjack multiplayer gameplay image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fcb7144f1609638ce56824a979457d282080cb2.png)
## вңЁ Features ### рҹҺ® **Immersive Gameplay** - **Physical Card Tables**: Place interactive blackjack tables anywhere in your world - **3D Card Displays**: Realistic card animations with custom resource pack support - **Multi-Player Support**: Up to 4 players per table with seamless turn management - **Smart Game Logic**: Professional blackjack rules with dealer AI ### рҹ’° **Economy Integration** - **EssentialsX Compatible**: Seamless integration with your server's economy - **Flexible Betting**: Configurable bet limits and cooldown periods - **Secure Transactions**: Anti-cheat measures and bet validation ### рҹ“Ҡ **Player Statistics** - **Comprehensive Tracking**: Wins, losses, pushes, and streaks - **Performance Metrics**: Track your best winning streaks and total earnings - **Persistent Data**: Statistics saved across server restarts ### рҹҺЁ **Visual & Audio** - **Colorized Chat**: Suit-based card colors (Red вҷҘвҷҰ, Dark Gray вҷ вҷЈ) - **Particle Effects**: Customizable win/lose particle displays - **Sound Effects**: Immersive audio feedback for game events - **Compact Interface**: Clean, spam-free chat with essential information ![Chat based betting for the plugin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/409589d5c7162fd75c9a19e7ee5fbf11363ac92a.png) ## рҹҡҖ Quick Start ### Installation 1. **Download** the latest `Blackjack.jar` from releases 2. **Place** the jar in your server's `plugins` folder 3. **Install** the required [@playing_cards](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bjplayingcards) resource pack 4. **Restart** your server 5. **Configure** settings in `config.yml` (optional) #### To merge with an existing resource pack: 1. Download [Resourceloader](https://modrinth.com/plugin/resourceloader). (You'd be supporting me!) 2. Merge your existing pack with the playing cards pack using the `/merge` feature ### Basic Usage ```bash # Create a table (Admin) /createtable # Join and play /join # Join nearest table /bet 100 # Place your bet /start # Start the game /hit # Take another card /stand # End your turn /stats # View your statistics ``` ## рҹҺҜ Commands & Permissions | Command | Description | Permission | |---------|-------------|------------| | `/createtable` | Create a new blackjack table | `blackjack.admin` | | `/removetable` | Remove the nearest table | `blackjack.admin` | | `/join` | Join the nearest table | `blackjack.play` | | `/leave` | Leave your current table | `blackjack.play` | | `/bet ` | Place or change your bet | `blackjack.play` | | `/hit` / `/stand` | Game actions | `blackjack.play` | | `/stats [player]` | View statistics | `blackjack.play` | ## рҹ”Ң PlaceholderAPI Integration Blackjack includes **40+ PlaceholderAPI placeholders** for extensive integration with other plugins: - **Player Statistics**: `%blackjack_stats_*%` (wins, losses, win rate, winnings, streaks) - **Table Information**: `%blackjack_table_*%` (players, status, location) - **Game State**: `%blackjack_game_*%` (hand value, turn status, dealer info) - **Betting**: `%blackjack_bet_*%` (current bets, limits, persistent bets) - **Economy**: `%blackjack_economy_*%` (balance, affordability checks) рҹ“– **[View Complete PlaceholderAPI Documentation](https://github.com/DefectiveVortex/Blackjack/blob/main/PLACEHOLDERAPI.md)** ### Quick Examples: ```yaml # Scoreboard integration - "&fWin Rate: &b%blackjack_stats_win_rate%%" - "&fAt Table: %blackjack_table_at_table%" - "&fCurrent Bet: &6%blackjack_bet_current_formatted%" ``` ## рҹ”Ң Plugin Integration ### Economy & Features - **Vault Compatible**: Works with any Vault-supported economy plugin - **GSit Support**: Auto-sit at tables when GSit is installed - **Version Checking**: Automatic update notifications for admins ## вҡҷпёҸ Configuration ### Core Settings ```yaml # Betting Configuration betting: min-bet: 10 max-bet: 10000 cooldown-ms: 2000 # Table Settings table: max-players: 4 max-join-distance: 10.0 table-material: GREEN_TERRACOTTA chair-material: DARK_OAK_STAIRS # Game Rules game: hit-soft-17: false # Display Settings display: card: scale: 0.35 spacing: 0.25 ``` ### Audio & Visual ```yaml sounds: enabled: true card-deal: sound: BLOCK_WOODEN_BUTTON_CLICK_ON volume: 1.0 pitch: 1.2 particles: enabled: true win: type: HAPPY_VILLAGER lose: type: ANGRY_VILLAGER ``` ## рҹҺІ Gameplay Features ![Blackjack multiplayer gameplay image 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d2a8de314690bc25dd79d8c7aaba0b283bcaeac.png) ### рҹғҸ **Card Display** - **Realistic 3D Cards**: Custom resource pack with detailed card textures - **Smooth Animations**: Cards dealt with proper positioning and rotation - **Hidden Dealer Card**: Traditional blackjack dealer hole card mechanics - **Color-Coded Suits**: Red hearts/diamonds, dark gray spades/clubs ### рҹҺҜ **Game Flow** 1. **Join Table**: Players approach and join available seats 2. **Place Bets**: Set your wager before the game begins 3. **Deal Cards**: Each player receives 2 cards, dealer gets 1 up + 1 down 4. **Player Turns**: Hit or stand to reach 21 without busting 5. **Dealer Play**: Dealer follows standard rules (hits on 16, stands on 17) 6. **Payouts**: Automatic economy integration with instant payouts ### рҹҸҶ **Results** - **Blackjack**: 3:2 payout (bet Г— 2.5) - **Regular Win**: 2:1 payout (bet Г— 2) - **Push (Tie)**: Bet returned - **Loss**: Bet forfeited ## рҹ“Ҳ Statistics Tracking Track your performance with detailed statistics: ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ Your Stats в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ Hands Played: 127 в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Wins: 58 (45.7%) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Losses: 51 (40.2%) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Pushes: 18 (14.2%) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Current Streak: 3 wins в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Best Streak: 7 wins в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Total Winnings: $2,450 в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` ## рҹ”§ Requirements - **Minecraft Version**: 1.20 or higher - **Server Software**: Spigot, Paper, or compatible forks - **Java Version**: 21 or higher - **Dependencies**: EssentialsX (for economy support) - **Resource Pack**: [@playing_cards](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bjplayingcards) ## рҹӨқ Contributing We welcome contributions! Please feel free to: - Report bugs via GitHub Issues - Suggest new features - Submit pull requests - Improve documentation ## рҹ“һ Support Need help? Reach out: - **Discord**: `@vortexunwanted` - **GitHub Issues**: [Report bugs/requests](https://github.com/DefectiveVortex/Blackjack/issues)
